INSERT INTO saas_companies (name, cnpj, email, type, active)
VALUES ('CO2 Contra Incêndio LTDA', '29.905.123/0001-53', 'admin@co2contraincendio.com.br', 'comercio', 1)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = VALUES(name);

INSERT INTO saas_users (companyId, email, passwordHash, name, role, isActive)
VALUES (
  (SELECT id FROM saas_companies WHERE email = 'admin@co2contraincendio.com.br' LIMIT 1),
  'admin@co2contraincendio.com.br',
  '$2a$10$N9qo8uLOickgx2ZMRZoMyeIjZAgcfl7p92ldGxad68LJZdL17lhWy',
  'Judson Aleixo Sampaio',
  'admin',
  1
)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE role = 'admin', isActive = 1;
